meaning: n.游荡者,游民,闹饮adj.无价值的vi.过游民生活,免费得到,流浪vt.乞讨
examples: 'Bum' is not a word we use in polite company.
This bum is an unemployed man in the slum.
That was our relationship: I was just a bum to her.
Thanks to the bum economy, not many people are hitting the malls these days.
No one knows if or when Jeter will make it back from his bum ankle.
